empty.title: No workspace yet
empty.description: Create your first workspace to start indexing content via git or synchronous push.

form.name: Name
form.api_key_ref_help: Logical name of the secret stored in Harpocrate (create the secret first via your Harpocrate server). Do NOT enter the raw API key.
form.base_url_help: URL of your Ollama instance (e.g. http://192.168.10.80:11434). Leave empty to use the default instance.
form.api_key_help: API key value (e.g. sk-…). It will be stored securely in the vault selected above.
form.api_key_vault_help: Vault where the workspace MCP api_key will be stored
form.api_key_vault_none: No vault configured. Create a vault first via Settings → Harpocrate.

consequences.db: The pgvector database rag_{{name}} will be dropped.
consequences.docs: The {{count}} indexed documents will be lost.
consequences.apikey: The workspace api_key will be revoked immediately.
consequences.agents: Agents using this api_key will receive 401.

model.title: Indexer model
model.immutableNote: These parameters are set at workspace creation and cannot be changed. To switch model or provider, recreate the workspace.

toasts.apikey_rotated: New api_key for {{name}}. Copy it now, it won't be shown again.
